# Delfi

> Autonomous trading bot for Polymarket prediction markets. Runs locally on macOS and Windows. Non-custodial: your wallet keys never leave your computer. One-time payment of $249 with lifetime updates.

Delfi watches every active Polymarket contract, backs the market favourite on every tradeable market within its risk gates, and stakes a flat fraction of bankroll scaled by per-archetype multipliers. Trades 24/7 automatically. Shows full reasoning on every trade.

## What it is

- Desktop application (macOS Apple Silicon and Windows 10/11) for trading on Polymarket
- One-time payment of $249 USD, lifetime access, free lifetime updates
- Non-custodial: keys stay on your machine, encrypted at rest in an OS-protected secrets file
- 14-day money-back guarantee
- Built-in simulation mode (paper trading) using the same logic the live bot uses

## How it works

- Scans up to 100 active Polymarket markets every 5 minutes
- Backs the market favourite (the side trading at or above 50 cents) on every tradeable contract that passes the bot's archetype skip list and risk gates
- Risk controls: maximum bet size, daily and weekly loss limits, maximum drawdown halt, consecutive-loss cooldown, reserve cash percentage
- Self-evaluating: every 50 settled trades, the bot proposes per-archetype tuning and per-strategy adjustments the user can apply or skip from the Intelligence page
- Full transparency: every trade comes with the underlying reasoning, source citations from the research pipeline, and the risk gates it cleared

## Pricing

$249 USD, one-time payment. Lifetime access. All future updates included.

14-day money-back guarantee. No forms, no questionnaires.
